name: Eagle Majesty Bird
desc: A symbol of freedom and vision. Perfect for content about national pride, high-level perspectives, and birds of prey.

name: Owl Wisdom Bird
desc: Represents intelligence and nocturnal life. High SEO value for educational content, night-themed posts, and avian biology.

name: Dove Peace Bird
desc: The universal symbol for peace and hope. Ideal for wedding planning, spiritual content, and international diplomacy topics.

name: Duck Water Bird
desc: Represents lake life and waterfowl. Great for park visit updates, hunting regulations, and cute animal photography.

name: Flamingo Tropical Bird
desc: Symbolizes elegance and tropical vibes. Popular in summer fashion, beach resort marketing, and Florida-themed content.

name: Parrot Exotic Bird
desc: The icon for colorful plumage and mimicry. Perfect for pet bird owners, tropical rainforest awareness, and pirate themes.

name: Penguin Antarctic Bird
desc: Technically a flightless bird of the south. Essential for climate change topics, winter aesthetics, and adorable wildlife clips.

name: Swan Graceful Bird
desc: Represents beauty, purity, and lifelong partnership. Targeted at bridal brands, ballet (Swan Lake), and luxury aesthetics.

name: Peacock Proud Bird
desc: A symbol of vanity and incredible natural color. Used for high-fashion inspiration and showcasing vibrant garden birds.

name: Songbird Nature Bird
desc: The general icon for small garden birds. Ideal for birdwatching hobbies, spring morning updates, and backyard feeders.

name: Turkey Farm Bird
desc: Primarily associated with Thanksgiving and agriculture. Used for holiday meal planning and seasonal autumn content.

name: Rooster Poultry Bird
desc: The symbol for early mornings and farm life. Perfect for 'rise and shine' motivation, agriculture, and fresh egg marketing.
